generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our current strategic autonomy policies are actually making us LESS secure? By relying too much on domestic solutions, we're cutting ourselves off from vital intelligence-sharing partnerships. Experts agree: balanced alliances with trusted partners are the only way to ensure real security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
